title: ServerMessage
description: Typed envelopes for non-RTVI events flowing between the cloud orchestrator and the mobile client over the Daily WebRTC data channel. Sits alongside the RTVI standard messages (user-transcription, bot-llm-text, etc.) which are not redefined here.

UserText.description: User-typed text from mobile InputBar. Handled by the orchestrator's HarnessBridgeProcessor identically to a voice transcript: in-flight check, then submit_text or submit_with_steer.

HarnessEventForUI.description: Wraps a HarnessEvent the orchestrator's registry routed to voice_action='ui-only'. Mobile renders as transcript pill / status row.

HarnessStateSnapshot.description: Periodic state snapshot for the mobile UI to derive 'is the harness busy' indicators.

InterruptIntent.description: PTT press from mobile. Hint to the orchestrator to begin the audio_stopped phase early. Not authoritative — the actual cancellation only happens once a transcript or user_text is received.

Notification.description: Overwatch-internal notification surfaced to the mobile UI. Mirrors the existing notification system.

ErrorResponse.description: Correlated error response. request_id echoes the originating envelope's id so the client can match.
